headline: EMCOR Group (EME) Sets Revenue Records As AI Data Center Demand Builds Backlog
summary: EMCOR Group's electrical construction segment has set new revenue records, supported by strong demand for AI data center projects. The segment's project backlog has expanded across healthcare, institutional, water, and manufacturing end markets. Advanced prefabrication and virtual design methods are being used to improve project efficiency and support long-term growth plans. For investors tracking EMCOR Group, NYSE:EME, the fresh records in electrical construction revenue arrive with the...

headline: EMCOR’s Dividend Amid Russell Index Exit Could Be A Game Changer For EMCOR Group (EME)
summary: In recent days, EMCOR Group, Inc. announced that its Board of Directors declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of US$0.40 per common share, payable on July 31, 2026 to stockholders of record as of July 15, 2026, while the company was also removed from multiple Russell indexes effective June 27, 2026. This mix of ongoing cash returns to shareholders alongside broad index removals highlights a tension between EMCOR’s income profile and changing institutional ownership dynamics. We’ll now...
